subcodes.first_line: O thou who art trustworthy! Hearken unto the Call of God, the True Sovereign, the Manifest One. Verily, there is no God but Me, the Mighty One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امین ان استمع ندآء الله الملک الحق المبین انه لا اله الا انا العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @thankfulness; gratitude
